dashboard.summary1: {team} owns the cleanest projected title route after surviving the semifinal branch.
dashboard.summary2: The model weights knockout control, recent form and matchup stability above pure group-stage dominance.
dashboard.summary3: Upset risk remains visible in the Round of 32, especially where best third-place teams enter the bracket.
dashboard.finalBranch: Final branch probability from the current mock prediction tree
dashboard.scheduleTreeText: Jump to the full group stage and knockout bracket with match-level reasoning.
dashboard.teamSearchText: Open the team lookup entry point for form, path and matchup inspection.
dashboard.dataProvenanceText: Review snapshot freshness, sources and Agent reasoning timestamps.

schedule.title: Full schedule and prediction tree
schedule.description: Browse all 12 groups and the 32-team knockout projection. Click any match node to open Agent reasoning.
schedule.wheelHelp: Wheel to zoom, drag to pan
schedule.mockGenerated: Mock generated at {time}. Completed nodes are greyed, live nodes pulse, upcoming nodes remain clean.

realSchedule.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup real schedule
realSchedule.description: A separated view for the confirmed tournament calendar, host cities, phase dates and official schedule milestones. This page is intentionally independent from the Agent prediction bracket.
realSchedule.milestonesHint: Key dates announced for the real tournament.
realSchedule.phaseHint: Known date windows for each competition stage.
realSchedule.hostCityHint: The 16 host cities across Canada, Mexico and the United States.
realSchedule.disclaimer: This first version focuses on the verified real tournament calendar, host cities and phase windows. Team-level fixtures and results change as the tournament progresses, so they should be connected to an official fixtures feed in a later step. The prediction tree remains a separate Agent-generated projection.

teamsPage.description: Search and team profile panels will live here. The route is ready so the dashboard stays concise.
